title.en: This is the race information detected by the co...

content.en:
Soon.

Those Supreme Ninefold Ancestors passed on the general information of this area, and told them not to enter the core area, because those Supreme Enhancement Rank and the Supreme Nine Ancestors were all fighting in the core area of this territory to snatch precious treasures.

Ye Tian also received the information, so he would not go to the core area of this territory for the time being, and would just mix around the periphery.

Because he was very unfamiliar with this territory, Ye Tian didn't dare to move forward rashly, so he could only explore the surroundings cautiously.

After a while, Ye Tian sensed the existence of some creatures, these creatures were very powerful, and they were the indigenous creatures of this territory.

"Golden Ape!"

This is the race information detected by the copy talent.

Rumble!!!!

A golden ancient ape was besieging a transformation-level being, and the fluctuations of the battle between the two sides were transmitted.

Ye Tian didn't go over immediately, but hid around and observed.

The strength of that Avatar Rank was not strong, and it was comparable to the Fourth Rank of the Ninefold Primordial Ancestors, and those Golden Ancient Apes were even weaker, and they were comparable to the weaker Fifth Rank Ninefold Primordial Ancestors.

However, the number of golden apes was very large, so it was difficult for the avatar class to escape.

Of course, the battle between the Transformation Rank or the Ninefold Origin Ancestor is difficult to kill unless the difference in strength is too great.

And these golden ancient apes only have the advantage of numbers, and it is still difficult to kill that avatar level.

If this avatar-level is desperate, there is no problem in escaping.

It's just that this avatar doesn't want to run away either, and is obviously waiting for rescue.

"Could it be that there's something good here?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Immediately, he began to explore the surroundings carefully, and finally found a piece of golden-red fruit, which was born and grew from small golden trees, and these golden trees grew from the depths of time and space, drawing on the origin of this piece of heaven and earth.

"What kind of fruit is this?"

Ye Tian was a little curious.

But there is no doubt that this fruit is definitely a very precious treasure, and it has unimaginable benefits for the Nine Origin Ancestors.

At this time.

These fruits are also guarded by a group of golden apes, so if you want to take these fruits, you must defeat them.

Ye Tian didn't hesitate at all, and was ready to do it immediately, otherwise that transformant-level powerhouse called other transformation-level, and I was afraid that it would not be his turn.

"Yuan Dun is extremely fast!"

Ye Tian crossed in front of those golden trees at an extremely fast speed, and immediately attracted the attention of those golden ancient apes.

Rumble!!!

The two sides immediately exchanged hands!

I saw Ye Tian casting the Nine Black Domains, wearing a colorless light mask, holding an endless golden spear, and a blow pierced through a golden ancient ape.

He is the second tier of the Ninefold Origin Ancestor, and this group of golden ancient apes is only the fifth tier, and the difference in strength between the two sides is very large.

With a single move, he can severely damage many golden ancient apes, and he can kill all of these golden ancient apes in a short time.

However, his goal is to take the golden fruit here, and that is the most important thing.

In an instant, one golden fruit after another fell into Ye Tian's hands, and although this group of golden ancient apes tried to stop him, they were all severely injured or killed by him.

After a while, all these golden fruits were taken away by Ye Tian.

Then, Ye Tian fled at an extremely fast speed.

Just a few moments after Ye Tian left, several avatar-level people appeared here, and one of them was as strong as the Ninefold Ancestor of the third order.

These avatar level quickly defeated these golden ancient apes, but they also knew that the golden fruit had been taken away by Ye Tian, so they could only choose to leave.

But just as they were about to leave, three incomparably terrifying golden ancient apes appeared.

"It's not good, let's go!"

The faces of these avatar-level people changed drastically, and they immediately wanted to escape.

But the strength of these three-headed golden ancient apes is comparable to the ninefold ancestor of the second tier, and it is also the top second tier, even if Ye Tian deals with one head alone, he may not be able to beat it, let alone the three-headed.

Thundered!!!

The three-headed golden ape fought with the three avatar-level, and after a period of time, one avatar-level fell, and the others escaped with heavy injuries.

I have to say that these chemical grades are a little unlucky, and they have suffered such losses without catching anything.

Now, these chemical-level creatures have escaped with heavy injuries and must leave here, otherwise they may not be able to save their lives here.

......

"I don't have time to study these golden fruits for the time being, so let's look for other resources!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently, he began to look for other resources.

However, many of the precious resources in this realm are controlled by some creatures, and if you want to obtain these resources, you have to fight these creatures.

Of course, there are some resources that are not protected by creatures, but require a certain amount of luck.

In addition, there will be fights between practitioners and primordial antiquities.

For example, Ye Tian had been attacked and killed by many Transformation-level Primordial Antiquities, but he relied on his strength to be strong, so he had nothing to do.

As time passed, Ye Tian's resources were getting more and more.

this day.

Ye Tian received a summons from Dongchen Dao Ancestor.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, come here now!"

Dongchen Daozu gave a coordinate and asked him to immediately go to the core area of this territory.

Ye Tian didn't know what was going on, but Dongchen Dao Ancestor must have had something good to do when he asked him to go over, so he immediately rushed over.

Almost a few moments later, the Soul Splitting Red Beast's replica body also received a summons from the Soul Elder, which also allowed him to go to the same position.

Obviously, these Supreme Enhancement Rank or Supreme Ninefold Origin Ancestors had discovered a treasure land of chance that would be of great help to the Nine Ancestors and wanted to let them go over immediately, so as not to miss the opportunity.

After a while, Ye Tian passed through the long territory and came to the core area of this territory, and met Dongchen Dao Ancestors and them.

At this time, a group of Ninefold Ancestors and Avatar Levels had already gathered here, all of whom had been called.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, go in immediately!"

Dongchen Daozu commanded.

At the same time, Dongchen Daozu transmitted some information to him, allowing him to understand the situation in an instant.

It turned out that Dongchen Daozu and they found a lair of racial forces here, and teamed up to kill the three creatures that were comparable to the reinforcement level here, occupied this place, and then discovered a special treasure land.

This treasure land was unimaginable for the Transformation Level, or the Ninefold Ancestor, and it disappeared once the intersection period ended.

Therefore, they let the Ninefold Ancestor or the Transformation Rank come over and enter the treasure land to cultivate, and improve their strength as quickly as possible.

Airplanes!!!

Ye Tian immediately entered a special space in the crack of the mountain, where a gray-red river flowed, and this river was a special energy.

One by one, the Ninefold Primordial Ancestor and the Avatar Level entered here, and immediately absorbed the energy of the gray-red river.

Rumble!!!

The unimaginable energy poured into the body, and began to refine Ye Tian's body, strengthening the life level and cultivation.

This ascension was much faster than before, and as everyone practiced, the gray-red river became smaller and smaller.

Obviously, the river will be exhausted, and even if it can continue to grow, it will take a long time.

Immediately.

Ye Tian exerted various Yuan Dao Ancestral Endowments, refining this gray-red energy with an absorption speed that far exceeded that of other Ninefold Origin Ancestors or Transformational Levels.
